Tests the behavior of the Math.exp function with negative infinity input.

# Purpose
This code is a simple assertion test that checks the behavior of the `Math.exp` function when applied to negative infinity. It verifies that dividing 1 by the result of `Math.exp(-Infinity)` yields positive infinity. This test ensures that the mathematical properties of exponential functions are correctly implemented in the JavaScript environment. The code provides narrow functionality, focusing on a specific mathematical operation and its expected outcome.
